creator: mvh@tis.com
text:
I made and installed the cxref port under /usr/ports/devel/cxref,
and it dumps core if I tried to use it.  The ports version is 1.4,
I downloaded and built 1.4b and it works.  I had to make a one line
change to get it to compile, and had to use gmake rather than make.

Fix: 

Port the new version, contact me if you need help.
